creator: kiliweb
ingredients_text: Southern blue whiting fillets (56%). Batter coating (44%) [sunflower oil, wheat flour, water, potato starch, corn flour, thickeners (1420, guar gum, xanthan gum), salt, dextrose, sugar, acidity regulators (451, sodium bicarbonate, 541, 450), yeast extract (contains barley)].
